nasb.text: God blessed them, saying, “Be fruitful and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply on the earth.”

esv.text: And God blessed them, saying, “Be fruitful and multiply and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply on the earth.”

cnv.text: 神就賜福給牠們，說：“要繁衍增多，充滿海洋；雀鳥也要在地上增多！”

ccb.text: 上帝赐福给这一切生物，说：“水族要生养繁殖，充满海洋，禽鸟也要在地上多多地繁殖。”

csbs.text: 神祝福它们说：“要繁衍增多，让生物充满海洋，让飞鸟在大地上增多。”
